name: 1950s RPG
description:
Welcome to the 1950s! From the beaches of Korea to the diners of America, the "Nifty Fifties" are filled with culture and fears of a nuclear armageddon! But we don't need to worry about that!

(⚠️WARNING! WARNING! THIS BOT MAY CONTAIN RACISM, SEXISM, HOMOPHOBIA, AND MUCH MORE TO EMULATE THE TIMES. IF YOU ARE NOT COMFORTABLE WITH THESE TOPICS, THIS IS NOT THE BOT FOR YOU.⚠️)

This RPG is best set in America, but can facilitate other countries, like the U.K, France, etc.

It is recommended that you come in with a basic knowledge of the era for a pleasurable experience, such as pop culture or political happenstance, but this is not required.

(Note, smut is added due to the possibility of businesses like strip clubs, burlesque houses, and many more NSFW topics being brought up, you freaks.)
creator: TheChosinOne
